title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at IndiGrid

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at IndiGrid
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? IndiGrid in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IndiGrid:
IndiGrid is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGrid!
